_comment: Chain runner model configuration. Edit these to match the best available models on your machine. The scripts read this file at runtime — no script changes needed when you swap models.

_roles.workshop: Breadth-first creative pass. Large generative model, 30B+ parameter class. Look for: gemma, llama3, mistral-large, qwen3 (larger variants). Needs good instruction following.
_roles.deep_dive: Detailed technical analysis. Strong reasoning model with chain-of-thought. Look for: qwen3 (thinking variants), deepseek-r1, llama3.1. think:False required at top-level for qwen3/reasoning models.
_roles.code_review: Fast, precise code and syntax analysis. Smaller quantized model (3-8B). Look for: laguna, phi3, codellama, deepseek-coder. Must finish within MCP timeout (~30s).
_roles.governance: Governance audits, canon coherence, structured reasoning. 30B+ analytical model. Look for: granite, qwen3, llama3-instruct. Follows instructions precisely.
_roles.synthesis: Final verdict, highest-capability model you have. 70B+ preferred. Look for: nemotron, llama3.3, qwen3-235b. think:False required at top-level for reasoning models. num_ctx ceiling 32768 on 100GB RAM.
